info.title: Komprai API
info.description: Documentação automática das rotas da API Komprai

post.description: Promotes the authenticated user (or a given userId) to admin role. Dev/staging only — requires a static bootstrap token.
Sets a password for users who signed up via social login or magic link and have no credential account yet. Required before enabling TOTP-based two-factor authentication.

get.description: Returns all stores scoped to the session's active organization. Requires an authenticated session with an active organization. Admins receive all stores regardless of organization.

userId.description: ID of the user who created the store

organizationId.description: ID of the organization that owns the store

403.description: No active organization in the session

post.description: Creates a new store under the session's active organization. The organization is derived from the session — `organizationId` is not accepted in the request body. Requires an authenticated session with an active organization.

active.description: Whether the store is active. Defaults to true.

userId.description: ID of the user who created the store

organizationId.description: ID of the organization derived from the session

403.description: No active organization in the session

get.description: Returns a single store by ID. Requires an authenticated session with an active organization. The store must belong to that organization (admins can access any store).

userId.description: ID of the user who created the store

organizationId.description: ID of the organization that owns the store

403.description: No active organization in the session, or the store belongs to a different organization

patch.description: Updates a store's name, description, or active status. Requires an authenticated session with an active organization. The store must belong to that organization. All body fields are optional — only provided fields are updated. Pass `description: null` to clear the description.

description.description: New description. Pass null to clear.

403.description: No active organization in the session, or the store belongs to a different organization

delete.description: Permanently deletes a store. Requires an authenticated session with an active organization. The store must belong to that organization. This action is irreversible.

403.description: No active organization in the session, or the store belongs to a different organization

get.description: Returns invoices for the authenticated user. Pass `organizationId` to retrieve invoices for an organization you belong to.
Returns a single invoice by ID. The authenticated user must own the invoice or be a member of the owning organization.
Returns up to 500 usage records for the authenticated user, sorted by most recent. Pass `organizationId` to retrieve usage for an organization you belong to.
Returns all billing resource configurations defining rates per resource type.

post.description: Creates a new billing configuration for a resource type, defining the billing model (flat or metered) and rate per unit.

patch.description: Updates the rate, currency, description, or active status of a billing resource configuration.

get.description: Returns all invoices across all users and organizations. Supports filtering by owner, period, and status.

post.description: Triggers invoice generation for a given billing period. Can target a specific owner or generate for all users and organizations in bulk.

patch.description: Marks an invoice as void. Voided invoices are retained for audit purposes but excluded from payment processing.

get.description: Returns active providers available in the current region. Providers define the integration schema that stores use to connect external data sources.

post.description: Registers a new provider with a JSON configuration schema that stores must satisfy when creating credentials. Admin only.

get.description: Returns a single provider by ID, including its configuration schema.

patch.description: Updates provider metadata, allowed regions, or configuration schema. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a provider. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all provider credentials associated with a store. Credentials hold encrypted configuration for connecting to an external provider.

post.description: Creates encrypted credentials for a provider on a given store. The `configuration` object must satisfy the provider's `configurationSchema`. Only one credential per provider per store is allowed.

get.description: Returns a single provider credential by ID. The configuration is stored encrypted and not exposed in the response.

put.description: Replaces the encrypted configuration for an existing provider credential. The new configuration is validated against the provider's schema before saving.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a provider credential from a store.

get.description: Returns all active deployment regions. Each region has its own Catalog API instance and pricing multiplier.

post.description: Creates a new deployment region. Admin only.

get.description: Returns a single region by ID.

patch.description: Updates a region's flag, location, pricing multiplier, or active status. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a region. Admin only.

get.description: Checks whether an email domain requires SSO login. Use this before showing the login form to redirect users to their identity provider.
Initiates the OIDC authorization flow for an organization. Redirects the user to the identity provider with a PKCE challenge.
OIDC redirect callback. Validates the authorization code, exchanges it for tokens, provisions the user account, and sets a session cookie.
Returns the OIDC configuration for an organization. Requires org owner or admin role.

post.description: Upserts the OIDC provider configuration for an organization. All email domains must be verified before they can be linked. Client secret is encrypted at rest.

delete.description: Removes the OIDC configuration for an organization, disabling SSO login for all its members.

get.description: Returns all domain verification records for an organization, including their DNS TXT challenge and current status.

post.description: Registers a domain for DNS verification. Returns the TXT record name and value that must be published before calling the verify endpoint.
Triggers a DNS TXT lookup to verify domain ownership. The domain status becomes `verified` on success or `failed` on DNS mismatch.

patch.description: Toggles `allowAutoEnroll` on a verified domain. When enabled, users whose email matches this domain are automatically provisioned as org members on first SSO login.

delete.description: Removes a domain from the organization's verified domain list.

get.description: Returns all reports owned by the authenticated user. Admins receive all reports.

post.description: Creates a new report with a query definition and visualization config. Reports can be embedded in dashboards.

get.description: Returns a single report by ID.

patch.description: Updates a report's name, description, type, query, or visualization config.

get.description: Returns all dashboards owned by the authenticated user. Admins receive all dashboards.

post.description: Creates a new dashboard with an optional initial set of widgets. Each widget references a report and includes a grid layout position.

get.description: Returns a dashboard with fully expanded report data for each widget, ready for rendering.

patch.description: Updates a dashboard's name, description, or widget layout. Replaces the entire widget list when `widgets` is provided.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a dashboard and all its widgets.

get.description: Returns metadata for a ProviderCredential for inter-service validation. The credential must belong to the active organization. Encrypted configuration is never exposed.
